title: Fish Axes
description: A creative 3D Fish Axe texture pack that turns ordinary axes into fun, fish-themed weapons with detailed models and a vanilla-style look.
body:
Fish Axes is a unique and fun 3D texture pack that reimagines axes with a creative fish-inspired design. Each axe features detailed 3D modeling with fish shapes, fins, scales, and smooth textures, making the weapon look both playful and eye-catching while still fitting the Minecraft style.

The pack keeps a balanced, vanilla-friendly look so it feels natural in survival, PvP, and casual gameplay. Fish Axes adds personality and creativity to your world without affecting performance.
